purpose: Emulator testing: key press logging, ADB coordinate validation, modifier double-toggle investigation

observations.details: APK installed, DevKey IME set as active input method. API 36 emulator, 1080x2400 screen.

observations.action: Test DevKeyPress and DevKeyMap logcat tags
observations.details: Zero output from DevKeyPress or DevKeyMap tags. Keyboard renders and accepts input (confirmed via UI dump — EditText fields found, keyboard visible). IME service is running. But logging code is not being reached. Tried: clearing logcat and retrying, dismissing/reshowing keyboard, checking all log tags. No DevKey-related logs found at all.
observations.root_cause_hypothesis: LaunchedEffect(Unit) for key map dump only fires once on first composition. If composable was already alive when APK was installed, it won't re-trigger. Key press logging may also not be wired into the actual code path being executed.

observations.details: Cannot validate coordinates — no DevKeyMap dump available. Blocked by observation #2 (logging not working).
Cannot investigate modifier behavior — no DevKeyPress logging available. Blocked by observation #2 (logging not working).

observations.action: Audit number row layout — missing dedicated 0 key
observations.details: Number row has 11 keys: [Esc][1][2][3][4][5][6][7][8][9][Tab]. The '0' digit is only accessible via long-press on Tab (full layout) or long-press on P (compact layout). User confirms this is a real UX problem — needs a dedicated visible 0 key.
observations.user_direction: User says layout needs reimagining. Also wants Backspace/Escape to be a smart dual-purpose key.

blockers.issue: Debug logging system produces zero output
blockers.impact: Blocks all 3 test tasks (key logging, coordinate validation, modifier investigation)
blockers.next_step: Debug why KeyPressLogger and KeyMapGenerator code is not being reached

layout_issues.issue: No dedicated 0 key — hidden behind Tab long-press
User wants smart Backspace/Escape dual key
